title: NLS focusing — direct (N, phi) vs Madelung-Psi methods
ic: Same IC as S1 (bright sech soliton).
stress_question: Does direct (N, phi) evolution succeed? At what point does the quantum pressure (sqrt(N))_xx / (2 sqrt(N)) singularity affect accuracy or stability? What is the failure mode if you do NOT use Madelung-Psi transform?
parameters_to_sweep: Try at least two methods: (a) direct spectral FFT on (N, phi) with quantum pressure computed directly, (b) Madelung-Psi split-step. Report which works, what fails, and ANY parameter regimes where they diverge.
